market.advice: Confirmed uptrend. VIX at 17.4 and falling — market fear is muted. Breadth is healthy (65% of stocks above 50-day MA). Only 2 distribution days. The Dow hit record highs this week as the tech-led rebound broadened into Financials, Industrials, and AI Infrastructure. Full position sizing is appropriate for clean setups. The big rotation story: Semis (LRCX/AMAT/KLAC/MU), Financials (C/BK/AIZ/CB), and Industrial Automation (ROK/CSX) are all breaking out simultaneously — a genuine multi-sector upleg, not a one-sector surge. Key macro wildcard: Iran nuclear talks in Doha and Israel-Lebanon ceasefire fragility. If either escalates sharply, be ready to tighten stops. One mild yellow flag: SPY is -1.5% over the past month while individual leaders sprint higher — leadership bifurcation. Ride the leaders, avoid the laggards.

picks.thesis: Rockwell Automation is the cleanest setup in the universe today. Pocket pivot at its 52-week high, RS line at new highs, EPS +40%, Rev +12%. The automation-plus-AI angle keeps institutional money flowing in — BofA recently cited ROK as a direct beneficiary of factory AI (autonomous manufacturing, predictive maintenance). Earnings 37 days away gives a clean pre-report runway. TV: STRONG_BUY (16 buy, 0 sell) — unanimous confirmation.

risks: fwd P/E 33x — premium requires sustained execution

watch: Hold above $450 (MA50) on any pullback
Earnings ~Aug 6 — trim half before report
TV: STRONG_BUY (16/0) — unanimous
